arts.sum: A member of the attacking ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona has been omitted from the club’s latest matchday squad. That’s according to journalist Víctor Navarro, who points towards Ansu…

arts.ttl: Man United 'approached Barcelona in January' with Red Devils prepared to make 'substantial offer' for Fermin Lopez
arts.sum: Manchester United were allegedly willing to pay £58m to sign Barcelona midfielder Fermin Lopez during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Sevilla vs Barcelona Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Barcelona will look to close the gap to league leaders Real Madrid when they take on Sevilla in La Liga tonight. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our predicted...

A win could see Sevilla climb into the top half of the table, but games don't come much tougher than facing Barcelona, who have picked up 24 points on the road this season, more than any other side. ...

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool in talks to sign De Jong from Barcelona
arts.sum: - Liverpool are the latest club rumored to be making a move for Barcelona midfielder Frenkie de Jong, according to El Nacional . - Chelsea are closing in on a deal to sign Sporting CP midfielder Dário Essugo, the Sun on Sunday reports.

arts.ttl: Sevilla set €45m asking price for Juventus target
arts.sum: Sevilla have had a relatively good season up until now, and a big reason for this is the excellent form of Dodi Lukebakio. The Belgian winger had a rather quiet first campaign at the Ramon Sanchez-Pizjuan, but it is in 2024-25 that he is starting to come into his own. arts.ttl: Barcelona starlet snubs €70m offers from Manchester United and Aston Villa
arts.sum: Barcelona had a quiet winter transfer window, with no one joining or leaving Hansi Flick’s first team squad during the month of January. However, that was not for the lack of trying, as the club were keen to bring in Marcus Rashford on loan from Manchester United, although a deal proved to be impossible. arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Catalan giants 'want record-breaking MLS wonderkid' who could be long-term Robert Lewandowski replacement
arts.sum: Barcelona are allegedly interested in signing New York Red Bulls striker Julian Hall, viewing him as a potential long-term replacement for Robert Lewandowski.
